tweets.text: Bitcoin exchange inflows jump 50% to 122K BTC avg. 📈 SOPR below 1.0 signals widespread losses, increasing selling pressure. Market participants are realizing sustained losses as BTC struggles to maintain valuation. (Source: Analysis)

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin exchange inflows up 50% vs. Feb! 🤯 Current inflows hit 122k BTC, way above the 82k annual baseline. SOPR is stuck below 1.0 (0.99 avg), meaning holders are realizing losses. This suggests a tougher correction than Feb. 📉 #Bitcoin #Crypto

tweets.author: cryptofox.news
tweets.text: Bitcoin exchange inflows are up 50% from Feb, reaching 122K BTC, while price plunged from $77K to $59K. SOPR remains below 1.0 (0.99), signaling realized losses. This combo of high selling volume & losses is driving the current pullback. #Bitcoin #Crypto #MarketAnalysis 📉
